_status: UI/control schema only, as of 2026-07-06 — see ISSUES.md ISS-9
_note: This registry defines HOW each field is rendered (control type, slider bounds, tooltip copy) — it does NOT hold benchmark numbers. Actual default values live in equipment-data/<type>.json (equipment-specific) or equipment-data/common-assumptions.json (shared across equipment), each with its own confidence/sourceId. A prior version of this file duplicated numeric defaults inline, several of them invented (no traceable source in data-requirements.md) — removed 2026-07-06, see ISSUES.md ISS-9. Slider min/max/step below are UI interaction bounds only, not benchmark claims.

tooltip.definition: The total upfront capital expenditure required to acquire the equipment, including basic machine costs and initial vendor pricing.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: See the selected equipment's data file for the sourced range and confidence level; prefer an actual vendor quotation over any benchmark.
tooltip.higherImpact: Increases initial financing or cash requirements, extends the payback period, and lowers the project's NPV/IRR.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Reduces upfront capital burden, shortens the payback period, and improves NPV/IRR.

tooltip.definition: The expected operational lifespan of the equipment before it is decommissioned or replaced.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Companies Act Schedule II (source S8, High confidence) sets 13 years for diagnostic scan equipment and 15 years for other medical/surgical equipment — see equipment-data/<type>.json for the value applied.
tooltip.higherImpact: Spreads depreciation over more years (improving annual book profits) and adds years of operational cash flow to NPV.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Accelerates annual depreciation and reduces the number of cash-flow years, lowering NPV.

tooltip.definition: The average number of patient procedures or scan sessions performed on the machine per working day.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Hospital-specific utilization by bed size/city tier is a genuinely unresearched gap (data-requirements.md §15) — this field has no safe default. Enter your own estimate; see equipment-data/<type>.json for any sourced benchmark once available.
tooltip.higherImpact: Linearly increases billed and realized revenue, boosting operating surplus, NPV, and IRR.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Reduces revenue; if usage falls below the break-even threshold, the investment becomes financially non-viable.

tooltip.definition: The average gross price billed per procedure before adjusting for insurance deductions, scheme discounts, or collection delays.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: See equipment-data/<type>.json for any sourced tariff benchmark and its confidence level; several equipment types (cath lab, ultrasound) have no reliable tariff source yet per data-requirements.md §15 and require user entry.
tooltip.higherImpact: Boosts operating margins and average realized revenue per scan, reducing the daily usage count needed to break even.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Shrinks margins and raises the daily break-even threshold.

tooltip.definition: The number of days per month the service is operational for commercial patients.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Defaults to 25 days, assuming Sunday closures or emergency-only/non-billing operations on Sundays — a modeling convention, not a researched benchmark (see common-assumptions.json).
tooltip.higherImpact: Increases annual procedure capacity and monthly revenue.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Reduces monthly procedural volume and revenue potential.

tooltip.definition: The interest rate used to discount future cash flows back to their present value, representing the hospital's Cost of Capital.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Unavailable — no sourced benchmark exists yet (see ISSUES.md ISS-9). Must be entered/confirmed by the user until a real WACC benchmark for Indian private healthcare capex is researched.
tooltip.higherImpact: Heavily discounts cash flows received in later years, reducing the calculated NPV.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Preserves the value of future cash flows, resulting in a higher calculated NPV.

tooltip.definition: The minimum acceptable Internal Rate of Return required by hospital management to approve the investment.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Unavailable — no sourced benchmark exists yet (see ISSUES.md ISS-9). Must be entered/confirmed by the user until a real hurdle-rate benchmark for Indian private healthcare capex is researched.
tooltip.higherImpact: Sets a stricter hurdle, making it more difficult for a project to score a 'Strong' Investment Outlook.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Relaxes the hurdle, allowing moderate-return projects to be marked viable.

tooltip.definition: The nominal annual interest rate charged by the financial institution on the borrowed capital.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Low-Medium confidence market range of 8-15% p.a. (sources S11/S12); 11.5% is a derived midpoint, not a quoted rate. Prefer the user's actual lender quote — see common-assumptions.json.
tooltip.higherImpact: Increases monthly EMI payments and total interest costs, lowering net monthly cash flows.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Lowers debt service costs and enhances cash flow after debt payment.

tooltip.definition: The duration of the loan payback term in months.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: Medium confidence, derived midpoint (60 months) of two cited lender ranges (S10: 12-84mo, S11: 3-120mo) — see common-assumptions.json.
tooltip.higherImpact: Reduces monthly EMI obligations but increases total cumulative interest paid over the life of the loan.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Increases monthly cash drain due to higher EMIs, but reduces total interest expense.

tooltip.definition: The setup time required for site preparation, civil/shielding work, licensing/regulatory approval, and installation before first revenue-generating use.
tooltip.defaultExplanation: No sourced benchmark exists yet per equipment type — see equipment-data/<type>.json. Enter your own estimate based on civil work, AERB/licensing, and vendor installation timelines.
tooltip.higherImpact: Extends the pre-revenue period, increasing pre-operative interest and the initial working capital gap.
tooltip.lowerImpact: Achieves faster commercial operations, reducing pre-opening cash losses.
